about.body: Cyril Prytula is a writer, screenwriter and producer with more than 15 years of experience across production companies, streaming platforms and TV networks. His work ranges from feature films and mini-series to long-running television shows, both as a writer and producer.
about.extra: Based in Lisbon, Portugal, Cyril works on new screenplays, a second SF novel, narrative design for a game studio and a collection of short stories.
